hooks.prompt: Check for frontend code changes by running: `git diff HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'apps/web/src.*\.(tsx?|css\.ts)$'`. If the output is EMPTY (no changed frontend files), immediately stop — do nothing else. If there ARE changed frontend files, use the Skill tool with skill='ff-review:review' to run a Frontend Fundamentals code review on the changes.
